claim_boundary: v6.0.3 derives the sigma quadratic-operator architecture and a finite family of admissible conditional sources. The parent action does not select their couplings, coefficients, physical signature, or a stable phase.
conditional_radius: L_c=q_0 sqrt[Z_0/(-A_eff)] only for constant A_eff<0 and zero extra boundary/collar shift
homogeneous_neumann_warning: q_0=0, so no universal finite-size barrier
q0: dimensionless lowest wave number fixed only after geometry and boundary conditions
reason: Z_0/A_eff and q_0 are unsourced branch data
